name: maxtac-source
description: Static analysis, optional codebase memory, source scan closure, thin exact-path closure, and external finding intake workflows for source code and existing decompiler output in MaxTAC research.

interface.shortDescription: SAST, codebase memory, scan closure, thin closure, intake, CFG, and OpenGrep evidence.
interface.longDescription: MaxTAC for Source adds static surface triage, optional codebase-memory-mcp graph usage, source diff/repo scan worklists with coverage receipts, thin exact-path source closure for tiny non-reportable targets, external finding intake normalization, focused control-flow evidence, and OpenGrep rule guidance for source code or existing decompiler output. It does not own reverse engineering; pair it with the domain pack that produces the code view, such as Binary or Android.
defaultPrompt: Use MaxTAC for Source to triage this authorized source target.
Use MaxTAC for Source with codebase memory to map this repository before triage.
Create a focused MaxTAC Source packet for this route or subsystem.
Run a MaxTAC Source scan with coverage receipts for this diff.
Create a thin MaxTAC Source closure for this one-file helper.
Normalize these external security findings for MaxTAC triage.
